title: Build longer daily answers
subtitle: Move from one sentence to three.
overview: Move from one sentence to three.
A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: I usually start my day with coffee and a short walk.
我通常以咖啡和短暂散步开始一天。
After that, I check my messages and plan my work.
之后，我查看信息并计划工作。
How do you usually start your day?
I usually start with coffee and a short walk.
我通常从咖啡和短暂散步开始。

items.en: I usually start my day with coffee and a short walk.
items.zh: 我通常以咖啡和短暂散步开始一天。

items.en: After that, I check my messages and plan my work.
items.zh: 之后，我查看信息并计划工作。

items.en: How do you usually start your day?
I usually start with coffee and a short walk.
items.zh: 我通常从咖啡和短暂散步开始。

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: How do you usually start your day?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I usually start with coffee and a short walk.
lines.zh: 我通常从咖啡和短暂散步开始。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: After that, I check my messages and plan my work.
lines.zh: 之后，我查看信息并计划工作。

items.en: I usually start my day with coffee and a short walk.
items.zh: 我通常以咖啡和短暂散步开始一天。

items.en: After that, I check my messages and plan my work.
items.zh: 之后，我查看信息并计划工作。

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
